testcase.name: hybrid flow - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: And User enters Email as "usernameKeyInPropFile" and Password as "passwordKeyInPropFile".passed And Click on Login..........................................................passed And user wait additional 10 sec.............................................passed And user click on create button.............................................passed And user enter event title "eventtitleInPropFile"...........................passed And user select date from date picker "dateInPropFile"......................passed And user scroll to Hybrid section...........................................passed And user clicks on Hybrid toggle............................................passed Then Venue and Address fields should be visible.............................passed And user enters venue "venueNameInPropFile".................................passed And user enters address "venueAddressInPropFile"............................passed And user clicks on Save button..............................................passed Then User can see overview page title "Overview"............................passed And user scroll to email section............................................passed And user click on preview...................................................passed And user click on insert token..............................................passed And user adds email tokens..................................................passed And user clicks on Save btn.................................................passed And user clicks on close btn................................................passed And user clicks on yes btn..................................................passed And User clicks on Reg Tab..................................................passed And user scroll to Attendee_type section....................................passed And user clicks on link and embed btn......................................passed And user clicks on Audience Link btn........................................passed And user enter first name "FirstnameInPropFile".............................passed And user enter last name "LastnameInPropFile"...............................passed And user enter email name "EmailInPropFile".................................passed And user enter company name "CompanyInPropFile".............................passed And user select inperson "InPropFile_Attendee_Type".........................passed And user clicks on register button..........................................passed
